fields.description: Master kill-switch for location capture. Ships OFF (dormant) — enable per deployment. Off = nothing fires, every task saves through the normal CRM flow.
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: Google Maps Platform API key, restricted to the Geocoding API + Maps Static API (and ideally to the server IP). Used server-side only — never sent to the browser. Blank = reverse-geocode + map are skipped (raw coordinates are still captured).
fields.label: Google Maps API Key

fields.description: Static map zoom level for the confirmation image (blank = 16).
fields.label: Static Map Zoom

fields.description: Reverse-geocodes a fixed sample coordinate and shows the resolved address — confirms the key, billing, and Geocoding API are live. Save the key first.
fields.label: Check Connection

fields.description: Lead grains (vertical/group/program) whose IN-PERSON activities enforce the doctor-clinic anchor + radius. Blank axis = wildcard. Empty = the guard never triggers (dormant) and activities behave exactly like Phase A.
fields.label: Location-Tracked Grains

fields.description: Role allowed to re-anchor a clinic location (System Manager can always re-anchor). Blank = only System Manager.
fields.label: Manager Override Role
